title: tabebuia pallida subsp. pentaphylla
intro: Tabebuia pallida subsp. pentaphylla, also known as the pink poui, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tabebuia pallida subsp. pentaphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
